Class DatabaseHelper.PrivateMessage

java.lang.Object
databasePart1.DatabaseHelper.PrivateMessage
Enclosing class:
DatabaseHelper
public static class DatabaseHelper.PrivateMessage extends Object
Represents a private message

  • Constructor Details

    • PrivateMessage

      public PrivateMessage(int id, int questionId, String to_user, String sender, String messageType, String content, LocalDateTime createdAt, boolean isRead)
      Constructor to create a new PrivateMessage
      Parameters:
      id - ID of the private message.
      questionId - ID of the question the message is meant for.
      sender - Username of the user sending the message.
      messageType - Type of message (Question or Answer).
      content - Content of the message.
      createdAt - Time the message was created.
      isRead - If the message is read or not.
